message: fix(docker): Replace npm ci with npm install in all Dockerfiles

files.patch:
@@ -23,7 +23,7 @@ WORKDIR /app
 FROM base AS dependencies
 
 COPY packages/agentdb/package*.json ./
-RUN npm ci --only=production
+RUN npm install --omit=dev
 
 # =============================================================================
 # Production Stage

@@ -20,7 +20,7 @@ FROM base AS dependencies
 
 COPY package*.json ./
 COPY agentic-flow/package*.json ./agentic-flow/
-RUN npm ci --only=production --ignore-scripts
+RUN npm install --omit=dev --ignore-scripts
 
 # =============================================================================
 # Production Stage

@@ -30,7 +30,7 @@ WORKDIR /app
 # Copy application
 COPY agentic-flow ./agentic-flow
 COPY package*.json ./
-RUN npm ci --only=production
+RUN npm install --omit=dev
 
 # Create coordination directories
 RUN mkdir -p /app/data/swarm /app/data/memory && \
